rejected_unfiled_generated_files.reason: Rejected because it reads as a male armored non-bear character and does not preserve Helian Xuedai identity.

notes: Generated in the parent thread using the built-in image generation tool.
Final board follows the existing vertical project character-board layout: three state panels plus lower detail and material panels.

Visual identity now preserves Helian Xuedai as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female warrior guard whose bear identity comes from oppressive human-beastfolk face structure, white sideburn and nape fur, claw-shaped facial markings, huge clawed hands, heavy guard build, and elite tribal equipment rather than prominent bear ears.
The final board explicitly avoids the prior bear-face beast-head direction, prior Frosthoof deer guard direction, v03 soft face / fake-ear read, and v04 plush-ear read.

The locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem was not redesigned. Northern symbol language appears as bear-claw cuts, bonewood, rawhide cord, oath cord, shield scratches, jade, bronze, and object materials rather than a new crest or public badge.
Rejected v001 deer-clan attempt, v002 bear-face attempt, v03 fake-ear / insufficient-pressure attempt, and v04 plush-ear attempt were retained in history before canonical replacement.
No background Codex thread was created because this was a single-asset direct parent generation.
